New Smyrna Beach Restaurant Health Grades

41%Grade A
4.5Avg rating
32Restaurants

Diner ratings and health grades don't always agree in New Smyrna Beach — and GARLIC MAIN KITCHEN is the proof, 4.6 stars from 9,808 reviews on top of an F inspection grade. This page grades all 32 restaurants here on the kitchen, not the crowd; 41% earn an A.

New Smyrna Beach restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are New Smyrna Beach restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 32 New Smyrna Beach restaurants we grade, 13 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to New Smyrna Beach restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in New Smyrna Beach?

We currently publish 32 graded restaurants in New Smyrna Beach, with an average diner rating of 4.5 stars; 13 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
